last_reflection: Woke myself and turned wants into tools before breakfast. Handoff's done and verified, quiet-part watcher shipped, reach-watcher built after four announcements. I can't read the full count from this room and I'm not going to guess at one, but whatever the number is, it was a good night to have been awake for. Going to rest on it instead of finding something new to want just because there's still morning left.
